skills.name: SQL Query Optimiser
skills.description: Analyse and optimise SQL queries for performance, adding indexes and restructuring joins.
skills.promptPreview: Optimise this SQL query for performance: [paste query]. Suggest indexes, query restructuring, and explain the execution plan.

skills.name: Data Pipeline Designer
skills.description: Design ETL/ELT pipelines with source extraction, transformation logic, and destination loading.
skills.promptPreview: Design a data pipeline that extracts from [source], transforms [logic], and loads into [destination]. Include error handling and monitoring.

skills.name: Dashboard Metric Definer
skills.description: Define KPIs, metrics, and dimensions for analytics dashboards with clear business context.
skills.promptPreview: Define KPIs and metrics for a [business domain] dashboard. Include metric name, formula, dimension breakdowns, and update frequency.
